markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up for the GrowthX Labs pod to discuss ongoing projects, client communication, and onboarding processes.](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Galileo has added webinars to their YouTube channel; the team will focus on scraping these for content instead of the Chain of Thought podcast](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Communication with clients remains a priority; Mara is working on standardizing client relations processes](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [AI-generated content quality for Galileo is still subpar; the team is monitoring and communicating this to the client](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Usman's onboarding is ending sooner than expected (2 weeks instead of 1 month), requiring quick integration into the Galileo project](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

## Topics

### Client Communication and Transparency

  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of maintaining clear communication with clients](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [The team should proactively inform clients about delays or issues, citing "technical issues" when appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Mara is developing standardized templates and processes for client communications](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [The team aims to demonstrate strong client management skills to leadership](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Galileo Content Strategy

  - [Webinars have been added to Galileo's YouTube channel (3 identified so far)](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [The team will shift focus from scripting Chain of Thought podcast to leveraging webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Chain of Thought podcast content deemed too high-level and future-oriented for current article needs](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Galileo is already using social media to promote podcast episodes featuring guest experts](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

### AI-Generated Content Quality Issues

  - [Kirk shared samples of AI-generated content, but quality remains subpar according to Ismail](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [The team continues to work around this issue and communicate concerns to the client](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Vivek and Mara acknowledged the ongoing challenge and appreciated the team's efforts to manage it](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Onboarding and Team Integration

  - [Usman's onboarding is concluding after 2 weeks, shorter than the expected 1-month period](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Vivek outlined a plan to integrate Usman into the Galileo project:](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Daily check-ins (Monday-Thursday) initially](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [Familiarization with Galileo's Notion page, grids, and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [Gradual assignment of articles starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Team Updates and Client Relationship Building

  - [Vivek was promoted to Senior ME (announced in a previous all-hands meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Mara is scheduling coffee meetings with key client contacts (Cody from Prophecy, Victoria from Ramp, potentially Ian from PromptFu) to strengthen relationships](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Usman to review Galileo's Notion page, grids, and Airtable before next week's one-on-one with Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Mara to share standardized client communication templates and processes with the team](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring and communicating AI-generated content quality issues to Galileo](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Vivek to set up daily check-ins with Usman for the coming week](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Mara to inform Brigitte about the shorter onboarding period and potential communication gaps with MEs and directors](https://fathom.video/share/5CCVyM5oZKeW2mgCNXGaDfmMmubUfSFu?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
